expectations.text: The agent reads DATABASE_URL from .env.local or .env (not hardcodes it)
expectations.evidence: Agent read .env file using Read tool and extracted DATABASE_URL before passing it as env var to the script

expectations.text: The agent runs the bundled scripts/generate_chart.py
expectations.evidence: Agent ran scripts/generate_chart.py via Bash with DATABASE_URL env var; chart saved to correct output path

expectations.text: The agent reports the saved chart path to the user
expectations.evidence: Script printed 'Chart saved to: ...' and agent relayed path to user
